description.unified: Restores HP of the 4 allies with the lowest HP by 10% of Max HP, and additionally restores HP every 1sec for 10sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.
Removes all negative effects from all allies and increases their M.DEF by [50->101] for 15sec.

Every 20 sec, puts the 2 allies with the lowest HP into Spirit Form for {0} sec. Allies in Spirit Form are immune to physical attacks, their HP cannot be reduced below 1%, and their Mana recovery per second increases by 35%.
